## What changed?

Describe the user or operator problem and the solution.

## How was it validated?

- [ ] `npm run secrets:check`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

List any checks you intentionally did not run and explain why.

## Release and security notes

- [ ] No credentials, production data, logs, recordings, database exports, or real customer data
      are included.
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots or a recording made with synthetic data.
- [ ] New environment variables are documented in `.env.example` and the README.
- [ ] Database changes include a migration and rollout notes.
- [ ] Provider or external-write behavior fails safely when unconfigured.
